tasks.title: Verify retryWithBackoff implementation meets spec
tasks.body:
## Context
The GitHub issue requests adding a `retryWithBackoff` function to `utils/retry.ts` with configurable `maxAttempts`, `initialDelay`, and `backoffMultiplier` parameters. The implementation already exists and tests pass.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [x] `retry.ts` exists at `src/utils/retry.ts`
- [x] Exports `retryWithBackoff` function with `maxAttempts`, `initialDelay`, `backoffMultiplier` parameters
- [x] `retry.test.ts` exists with comprehensive tests (16 tests passing)
- [x] TypeScript compiles without errors
- [x] All parameters are configurable as specified

## Test Strategy
- Run `pnpm vitest run src/utils/retry.test.ts` to verify all 16 tests pass
- Run `pnpm tsc --noEmit src/utils/retry.ts` to verify TypeScript compilation
